name: AutoStore Holdings
longBusinessSummary: AutoStore Holdings Ltd. provides robotic and software technology in Norway, Germany, Europe, the United States, Asia, and internationally. It offers controllers, robots, grids, bins, and ports. The company offers robots, including R5, R5+, R5 Pro, and R5+ Pro under the Red Line names; AutoStore Bin Lift Grid-to-Grid (G2G) configuration; AutoStore Grid; AutoStore Multi-Temperature Solution, a storage solution for frozen and chilled environments; Grid Bracer; controller module for warehouse operations; QubIt fulfillment software and platform; and Unify Analytics data platform. It also provides CarouselAI, an automated robotic picking workstation solution; VersaPort, a cost-effective workstation; ConveyorPort, a workstation to access bins in the AutoStore grid; CarouselPort that maintains workstation productivity and coordination between robot and man; SwingPort, a work space outside of the storage are; RelayPort workstation; PickUpPort which provides frictionless in-store pickup options; FusionPort workstation; and FusionPort Staging. In addition, the company offers installation, maintenance, and training of personnel services. It serves grocery, retail, third party logistic, industrials, and healthcare industries. The company was formerly known as AutoStore NewCo Ltd. and changed its name to AutoStore Holdings Ltd. in October 2021. AutoStore Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Nedre Vats, Norway.
